summary: Comprehensive testing of Visual Template UI and Clean Text Output fixes (Iteration 12). Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified via Playwright. All user-reported issues have been fixed: 1) Template selection now shows VISUAL CARDS with mini-previews, accent colors, and descriptions, 2) 5 professional templates available, 3) Change Template & Regenerate button works, 4) Output is clean plain text without ## or ** markdown.
passed_tests: GET /api/resume/templates returns exactly 5 templates
Each template has preview metadata (header_style, section_dividers) for visual card rendering
Each template has style object (accent, layout, font) for mini-preview styling
Each template has prompt_instruction for AI formatting
POST /api/resume/improve with template_id produces clean text without ## or **
POST /api/resume/improve with force_regenerate=true regenerates with different template
POST /api/resume/download-access returns has_access boolean field
POST /api/resume/download-access requires resume_id (returns 400 if missing)
Template names are professional: Executive Professional, Modern Tech, ATS Maximum, Career Pivot, One-Page Compact
UI: Resume optimizer page loads with 4-step progress
UI: After file upload, analysis shows Overall Score and ATS Score
UI: Analysis shows Strengths, Weaknesses, Missing Keywords, Suggestions
UI: Template section shows 'Choose a Template & Optimize' header
UI: 5 visual template cards rendered with data-testid attributes
UI: Template cards show mini-preview with accent color and layout info
UI: Clicking template card highlights it with border/ring
UI: 'Optimize with Selected Template' button appears after selection
UI: Improved resume shows clean formatted text (no markdown symbols)
UI: 'Change Template & Regenerate' button visible after optimization
UI: 'Pay to Download' button appears for unpaid users
UI: Change Template flow returns to template selection
seed_data_creation: Created test resumes during testing for improvement tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported issues have been fixed: 1) Visual template cards now show mini-previews with accent colors and layout information, 2) 5 professional templates available with descriptive names, 3) force_regenerate param allows changing template after initial optimization, 4) AI output is clean plain text with ALL CAPS section headers and no markdown symbols. The ResumePreview component in React renders the text with styled section headers, bullet points, and proper formatting.

features_verified.visual_template_cards: Working - Cards show mini-preview, name, description, style tags (layout, font)
features_verified.professional_templates: Working - 5 templates: Executive Professional, Modern Tech, ATS Maximum, Career Pivot, One-Page Compact
features_verified.template_selection_highlight: Working - Selected card shows checkmark and border-primary/ring styling
features_verified.clean_text_output: Working - AI output has no ##, **, or ``` markdown symbols
features_verified.all_caps_section_headers: Working - Sections use PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY, WORK EXPERIENCE, SKILLS format
features_verified.change_template_regenerate: Working - Button returns to template selection with force_regenerate=true
features_verified.pay_to_download: Working - Unpaid users see 'Pay EUR 19.99 to Download' button
features_verified.preview_metadata: Working - Templates include preview.header_style, preview.section_dividers, style.accent

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/resume/templates: 200 OK - Returns 5 templates with preview, style, prompt_instruction data
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/resume/improve: 200 OK - Returns improved_text without markdown, respects template_id and force_regenerate

ui_screenshots.template_cards: .screenshots/02_template_cards.png - Shows 5 visual template cards with mini-previews
ui_screenshots.improved_resume: .screenshots/04_improved_resume.png - Clean text output with styled formatting
